LNORRIS, JUDGE; FHENTON, CLERK; PHEARD, CSR. C/C FOR PROVE- UP HEARING. PAUL PERDUE, ESQ. APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLTF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE COURT FOUND IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF EMILIA DYDASCO AND AGAINST DEFENDANT JOPHREY YVES-BISHOP FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 1060 HAIGHT ST; LEASE FORFEITED; $2,974.98 DAMAGES; ATTY FEES PURSUANT TO CCP 1033.5 & COSTS TO BE FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YVES-BISHOP, JOPHREY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1060HAIGHT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,974.98 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,974.98, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS GRANTED TO EMILIA DYDASCO FROM JOPHREY YVES-BISHOP PURSUANT TO CCP 1033.5, CRC 870.2 AND MEMO OF COSTS TO BE FILED.
STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DYDASCO, EMILIA
SERVICE FEE COPIES AND IRONMOUNTAIN RUSH FILE FILED BY DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
